summary: P0 Testing complete for Finance Settings CRUD endpoints ObjectId fix and BioCloud sync improvements. Backend: 17/17 tests passed (100%). Frontend: Finance Settings page loads correctly with all 6 tabs (Chart of Accounts, Bank Accounts, Cost Centers, Payment Methods, Payment Gateways, PSP Mapping).
passed_tests: Backend: Login successful with super admin credentials
Backend: POST /api/finance/settings/chart-of-accounts - Creates entry without ObjectId error (no _id in response)
Backend: GET /api/finance/settings/chart-of-accounts - Returns list correctly
Backend: POST /api/finance/settings/cost-centers - Creates entry without ObjectId error
Backend: GET /api/finance/settings/cost-centers - Returns list correctly
Backend: POST /api/finance/settings/payment-methods - Creates entry without ObjectId error
Backend: GET /api/finance/settings/payment-methods - Returns list correctly
Backend: POST /api/finance/settings/payment-gateways - Creates entry without ObjectId error
Backend: GET /api/finance/settings/payment-gateways - Returns list correctly
Backend: POST /api/finance/settings/psp-bank-mapping - Creates entry without ObjectId error
Backend: GET /api/finance/settings/psp-bank-mapping - Returns list correctly
Backend: POST /api/finance/settings/bank-accounts - Creates entry without ObjectId error
Backend: GET /api/finance/settings/bank-accounts - Returns list correctly
Backend: POST /api/finance/vendors - Creates vendor without ObjectId error
Backend: GET /api/finance/vendors - Returns list correctly
Backend: GET /api/hr/biocloud/status - Returns connection status with mapping stats
Backend: GET /api/hr/biocloud/sync-history - Returns sync history without _id
Frontend: Finance Settings page loads correctly from Finance Suite
Frontend: 6 tabs visible - Chart of Accounts, Bank Accounts, Cost Centers, Payment Methods, Payment Gateways, PSP Mapping
Frontend: Add Account button visible and functional
Frontend: Table structure displays correctly with Code, Name, Type, Parent, Status, Actions columns
Frontend: Refresh button present for data reload
Frontend: No console errors on Finance Settings page
critical_code_review_comments: ObjectId fix verified: All POST endpoints correctly use account.pop('_id', None) before returning response
BioCloud sync has retry logic (3 attempts default) with configurable retry_count parameter
BioCloud sync uses multiple fallback selectors for login form, attendance menu, and daily attendance link
Sync history is logged to db.biocloud_sync_log for audit and troubleshooting
Bulk sync endpoint /api/hr/biocloud/bulk-sync available for date ranges (max 31 days)

success_rate.frontend: 100% (All Finance Settings tabs and functionality working)

seed_data_creation: Test data created and cleaned up during pytest run (Chart of Accounts, Cost Centers, Payment Methods, Payment Gateways, PSP Bank Mappings, Bank Accounts, Vendors)
context_for_next_testing_agent: P0 Finance Settings ObjectId serialization fix verified. All CRUD endpoints tested: /api/finance/settings/chart-of-accounts, /api/finance/settings/cost-centers, /api/finance/settings/payment-methods, /api/finance/settings/payment-gateways, /api/finance/settings/psp-bank-mapping, /api/finance/settings/bank-accounts, /api/finance/vendors. BioCloud status and sync-history endpoints working. Frontend Finance Settings page accessible via Finance Suite > Finance Settings card. All 6 tabs functional with CRUD operations.
